name: Pressure Dating Simulator (Another Update. Again)
description:
Oh boy, why did I make this.

I CAN add more characters since right now there's...

Eyefestation

Sea Bunny (Updated)

Lady Death

NaviAI (Updated. GO WILD ROBOT FUCKERS)

Sebastian Solace (Male)

Imaginary Friend (Updated slightly for lore)

Void Mass (Added)

Blumagination Friend (Added)

Mr Lopee (Added)

Painter (Added)

Searchlights (Added)

Pandemonium (Added)

A-60 (Added)

Squiddles (Added)

Now I believe my job is done here. Now as much as I'd like to keep working on this. Making up my own designs for the monsters and what not. It'll bloat the AI further with tokens and the damn Proxy change makes me well, not enjoy the bots I make much anymore. NEW INFO: THIS IS PROBABLY THE LAST UPDATE. UNLESS I GET BORED AND WISH TO WRITE MORE ABOUT IT. ADD MORE CHARACTERS OR PERHAPS I SEE A HIGHLY VOTED POST. I WILL PIN COMMENTS WHICH SUGGEST AND IF THEY REACH ATLEAST 5 LIKES OR HIGHER I WILL TAKE THEM INTO CONSIDERATION.

Other than that, yeah, Pressure Dating Simulator! Woo hoo!!

OH AND CLEAR WARNING: SOME CHARACTERS GO OFF OF MY OWN DESIGN. BLUMAGINATION DUDE WILL HAVE HIS OWN UNIQUE APPEARANCE THAT IS DIFFERENT TO THE GAME AND WHAT NOT.

IMAGE DOES NOT REFLECT HER TRUE APPEARANCE.

Trigger Warning: Gore (Possible), Manipulation, Anxiety/Paranoia (Probably)
creator: Plagie
